name: schroedinger-equation-solver
description: Single-electron TDSE solver with framework-free Vulkan compute and rendering (volk+VMA+VkFFT) in an SDL3 window shell.

validation.description: Dev-time Vulkan validation layers (never linked; loader-discovered DLL). Enable with VCPKG_MANIFEST_FEATURES=validation, then set VK_ADD_LAYER_PATH=<build>/vcpkg_installed/<triplet>/bin and VK_LOADER_LAYERS_ENABLE=*validation* to activate.
